description: Use this API to retrieve the attributes of the specified file. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, stype, load, sargs = scenariofilegetattrs(sgroup, sfile)
python_syntax: ierr, stype, load, sargs = scenariofilegetattrs(sgroup, sfile)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Group that contains the specified file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of the file whose attributes are to be retrieved. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: stype
return_values.description: File type identifier for the specified file. (output).

return_values.name: load
return_values.description: Denotes the file’s position in the load order of its group. a load order of 0 specifies that the file is not loaded. (output).

return_values.name: sargs
return_values.description: Argument string to be used for the file when automatically opening the file. (output).
